description: Fix remaining build/typecheck/lint issues across the monorepo to ensure all 16 apps, 85+ packages, and 8 services pass turbo typecheck, build, and lint. This includes fixing any import resolution errors, missing exports, config issues, and ensuring the new admin app integrates cleanly.
steps: Step 1 - Run `pnpm turbo typecheck` from the monorepo root and identify all failures. Categorize them by: missing imports, type errors, config issues.

Step 2 - Fix package export issues: Ensure all packages referenced by apps (especially @quant/shared-ui, @quant/common, @quant/database, @quant/server-core, @quant/auth, @quant/realtime, @quant/ai) have valid main/types entries in their package.json and their src/index.ts exports resolve.

Step 3 - Fix frontend build issues: For each app that fails `next build`, fix the root cause. Common issues: missing page components, invalid imports, App Router vs Pages Router conflicts, missing CSS module imports.

Step 4 - Fix backend typecheck issues: For each app with a tsconfig.backend.json, ensure backend/ files compile cleanly. Common issues: missing type imports from @quant/server-core, incorrect Fastify plugin type augmentation.

Step 5 - Fix lint issues: Run `pnpm turbo lint` and fix any errors (not warnings - the eslint config has many rules turned off). Focus on: no-console in source files (use Fastify logger instead), any remaining hard errors.
Step 6 - Ensure pnpm-workspace.yaml includes apps/admin (it already includes apps/* glob so this should be automatic).
Step 7 - Run final verification: `pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo build && pnpm turbo lint` - all must pass.
acceptance_criteria: `pnpm turbo typecheck` completes with 0 failures across all workspace packages
`pnpm turbo build` completes with 0 failures across all workspace packages
`pnpm turbo lint` completes with 0 failures across all workspace packages
The admin app (@quant/admin) is included in the turbo pipeline and passes all checks
